modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble installing SAS University Edition for PUBH 701 course

full_description_text:  
I am trying to install the SAS University Edition software for my PUBH 701 class. However, I am having issues with the installation process. I am using VirtualBox, but it seems like something is not working right. I need help to get this software set up properly.

description: I am trying to install the SAS University Edition software for my PUBH 701 class. However, I am having issues with the installation process. I am using VirtualBox, but it seems like something is not working right. I need help to get this software set up properly.
